definitions.durationSec: max(metadata ym:s:visitDurationShort, fetchHit.result.data.duration); source values are seconds
definitions.pageHeight: maximum resize.meta.pageHeight, falling back to fetchHit.result.data.documentHeight
definitions.scrollDepthPct: min(100, (maxScrollY + viewportHeight) / pageHeight * 100); viewport-bottom exposure, not raw scrollY/pageHeight
definitions.formEvents: raw focus/change events whose target is a form control, plus submit; blur and ordinary clicks are excluded
definitions.converted: at least one raw Webvisor event.type=submit; submit formId resolves to the registration form in every converted visit

definitions.interactionStart: focus or change on a DOM input/textarea/select

visitFeaturesCrossCheck.role: cross-check only; all reported analytics above are derived from raw JSON
